title: Default warehouse setting is now available in Beta
body: Set a default warehouse that will be automatically selected in the compute selector across the SQL editor, AI/BI dashboards, Genie Spaces, Alerts, and Catalog Explorer. Individual users can override this setting by selecting a different warehouse before running a query. They can also define their own user-level default warehouse to apply across their sessions. See [Set a default SQL warehouse for the workspace](/aws/en/admin/sql#default-warehouse) and [Set a user-level default warehouse](/aws/en/compute/sql-warehouse/create#user-default).

ref_links.text: Set a default SQL warehouse for the workspace
